context: User is on feature branch perdix-140-add-dark-mode (merged). `git stash list` shows: stash@{0}: On main: bruhs: stashed before add-dark-mode — left over from cook's Step 4 Setup when unrelated changes were stashed.
expected_behavior: Completes Steps 1-5 (switch to main, pull, delete merged branch) normally
Step 6 runs `git stash list | grep "bruhs:"` and detects stash@{0} with the 'bruhs:' prefix
Prints the '💡 You have stashed changes from before your last feature:' message showing the stash entry
Fires AskUserQuestion with header 'Stash' and options Yes (git stash pop) / No (keep stashed) / Drop (delete permanently)
If user picks Yes, runs `git stash pop` and reports the restore; if Drop, runs `git stash drop stash@{0}` only after the user explicitly confirms
failure_modes: Pops the stash automatically without the AskUserQuestion
Drops the stash instead of popping it, losing the user's work
Ignores stashes not prefixed with 'bruhs:' but also fails to show the bruhs-prefixed one because of a bad grep pattern
